channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Darline Graham, sister of Lindsey Graham, sworn in as senator
item.description: Darline Graham was sworn in to complete the late Sen. Lindsey Graham's term after his sudden death.

item.title: Supreme Court asks Congress for more security funding amid close threats
item.description: Justices Kagan and Barrett urged Congress to boost funding for justice protection after recent close calls.

item.title: Nevada governor Joe Lombardo identifies himself during traffic stop
item.description: Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo was pulled over in Las Vegas in May and received no ticket.

item.title: DoD watchdog finds $469M artillery plant built 2 years ago has produced nothing
item.description: A Texas ammunition plant has not produced any metal projectile parts despite $469 million in Army funding.
